Poker Hand #HD2001: Hold'em No Limit ($0.50/$1) - 2026/06/20 21:00:00
Table 'NLHGold7' 6-max Seat #3 is the button
Seat 1: 1a2b3c4d ($100 in chips)
Seat 2: 5e6f7a8b ($120 in chips)
Seat 3: Hero ($100 in chips)
1a2b3c4d: posts small blind $0.50
5e6f7a8b: posts big blind $1
*** HOLE CARDS ***
Dealt to Hero [Ah Kd]
Hero: raises $1.50 to $2.50
1a2b3c4d: folds
5e6f7a8b: calls $1.50
*** FLOP *** [Td 9d 6h]
5e6f7a8b: checks
Hero: bets $2
5e6f7a8b: folds
Uncalled bet ($2) returned to Hero
Hero collected $5.25 from pot
*** SUMMARY ***
Total pot $5.5 | Rake $0.25
Board [Td 9d 6h]
Seat 3: Hero collected ($5.25)

Seat 1: Hero (15000 in chips)
Seat 2: 9c8d7e6f (22000 in chips)
Hero: posts small blind 150

*** HOLE CARDS ***
Dealt to Hero [2c 2d]
Hero: folds

9c8d7e6f collected 450 from pot

Poker Hand #HD2003: Hold'em No Limit ($0.50/$1) - 2026/06/20 23:00:00
Table 'NLHGold7' 6-max Seat #3 is the button
Seat 2: 5e6f7a8b ($110 in chips)
Seat 3: Hero ($100 in chips)
Seat 5: 9g0h1i2j ($95 in chips)
5e6f7a8b: posts small blind $0.50
9g0h1i2j: posts big blind $1
*** HOLE CARDS ***
Dealt to Hero [Qs Qc]
Hero: raises $1.50 to $2.50
5e6f7a8b: folds
9g0h1i2j: calls $1.50
*** FLOP *** [Td 9d 6h]
9g0h1i2j: checks
Hero: bets $1.75
9g0h1i2j: calls $1.75
*** TURN *** [Td 9d 6h] [2c]
9g0h1i2j: checks
Hero: checks
*** RIVER *** [Td 9d 6h 2c] [7s]
9g0h1i2j: checks
Hero: checks
*** SHOWDOWN ***
9g0h1i2j: shows [Ad Td] (a pair of Tens)
Hero: shows [Qs Qc] (a pair of Queens)
Hero collected $9.50 from pot
*** SUMMARY ***
Total pot $10 | Rake $0.50
Board [Td 9d 6h 2c 7s]
